description: Probably a court register with multiple distinct legal entries. Many of them have to do with partnerships. There is also a section with a letter draft stating that 'the slave fulfilled the order of the master' by making the symbolic purchase from Hiba and Ibrāhīm that they are satisfied with the terms of the partnership. Merits further examination. (Information in part from CUDL.) T-S 10J14.4 (PGPID 7880) and T-S AS 157.40 (PGPID 17999) look like the hand of the same scribe.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
